title: Guidelines on validated procedures for harmonised type testing based on existing IEC standards (e.g., IEC 61526, IEC 60846-1, IEC 60846-2, IEC 61017, IEC 60532 and IEC 62387) including a report on where requirements in existing standards deviate and standardisation gaps exist for radiation protection dosimeters for photon radiation
author: Kržanović, Nikola
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The Project Deliverable presents the summary and comparison of the IEC type testing standards (the scope, methods of test, minimum rated range, limits of variation) for individual and ambient monitoring. The conclusions from the aggregated calibration data and data acquired from measurement protocol were used together with the standard comparisons to propose inputs for the update and harmonization of type testing standards. A harmonized type testing protocol for active electronic dosimeters was presented.
steps_raw: The Project Deliverable presents the summary and comparison of the IEC type testing standards (the scope, methods of test, minimum rated range, limits of variation) for individual and ambient monitoring. A harmonized type testing protocol for active electronic dosimeters was presented.
